subcodes.first_line: O radiant youth! Thy sweet countenance reached 'Abdu'l-Bahá and was gazed upon with utmost care [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جوان نورانی شمائل پر حلاوت نزد عبدالبهاء رسید و بدقت تمام نظر کرد پرتو
subcodes.subjects: @radiant countenance; bearing the divine fragrance, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @thankfulness; gratitude, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
